reason: w0a-adjustments-sharing-one-effective-time observed stock_on_hand == 3.0 with three adjustments at ONE effective time. That value is farmOS entity-id insertion order's fingerprint: the six permutations of the same three events yield four different totals. It is evidence that same-time adjustments are sequenced by something, not evidence of WHICH value is correct, so it must not score for or against a port whose replica ordering differs. Reported, never counted.
